Testing Only — BS 7671:2018+A3:2024 Appendix 6
{{ referenceNumber }}
Page 1

Schedule of Tests

Testing Record — No Installation Certificate Issued

What is this document? This is a standalone Schedule of Tests record produced by a subcontractor tester. It records test results only — no installation certificate, inspection checklist, or company details are included. The main contractor is responsible for issuing the full EIC/EICR.
